name: Russ Case
abstract: Russ Case (March 19, 1912 – October 10, 1964) was an American trumpeter and bandleader who led jazz and light music orchestras.

concerts.label: Paul Whiteman and His All American Band

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Johnson Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: one of the A&R men I think was Russ Case... He said let’s go back and try the first one.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Johnson Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, Ellenville, New York, June 23, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Well, Russ Case was one of the leading conductors they had up there in those days

about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I assume Russ Case was a friend of yours. [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah.
